docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRANILLO, LIGIA GUADALUPE NAVARRETE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
